notes: Confirmed today's WC quarterfinal Spain–Belgia (10 Jul, 21:00 norsk) on TV 2 / TV 2 Play via the tvkampen match article + VG/NRK guides — matches events.json. NB: tv-listings.json (tvkampen JSON) listed only 'Svt' for this match; that is an incomplete Nordic-aggregate entry, not a rights change — the Norwegian broadcaster is TV 2.

Amended TdF stage 13 (Dole–Belfort, 17 Jul): start is 13:00 CEST = 11:00 UTC per cyclingstage; events.json had 10:30 UTC — corrected to 11:00 UTC (now matches published start and the neighbouring stages). Route (205.8 km, Col des Croix + Ballon d'Alsace 30 km from finish) confirmed. verificationStatus=amended.

Removed TWO duplicate ESPN semifinal placeholders re-added by the static pipeline: 'Quarterfinal 2 Winner at France' (14 Jul 19:00 UTC, AT&T Stadium) and 'Quarterfinal 4 Winner at Quarterfinal 3 Winner' (15 Jul 19:00 UTC, Mercedes-Benz Stadium), both carrying tentative 'NRK / TV 2'. Each duplicates an ai-research VM-semifinale (same time/venue, TV 2 confirmed via NRK's guide 09 Jul). This is the recurring WC-knockout duplication (removed 09 Jul too): build-events dedupes by sport|title|time and the ESPN placeholder titles differ from the Norwegian ai-research titles, so the placeholders keep coming back. Still needs a build-events dedup fix rather than weekly manual removal.

Did NOT re-verify events confirmed within the last 24–72h and unchanged: Sjakk-NM (ends 11 Jul), Wimbledon finals (11–12 Jul), Diamond League Monaco (10 Jul), the England–Norway QF (11 Jul, TV 2) and Argentina–Switzerland QF (12 Jul, NRK), VM-semifinale 1 & 2 (both TV 2, confirmed 07–08 Jul via NRK guide), The 154th Open (16–19 Jul), and TdF stages 6–12 (all confirmed 05–09 Jul).

Skills unchanged: the recurring ESPN WC-placeholder re-add is a build-events dedup gap, not a source failure mode, so it stays out of source-quirks (per 09 Jul reasoning). norwegian-rights WC split (NRK1/TV 2 per match) already correct; the 'verify per match' note stands.
